LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-28-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT S ANDREW COHEN, PROACTIVE CHIROPRACTIC COHEN CORP. A CORPORATION, AND ANDREW COHEN'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 430.41. CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 430.41 REQUIRES A DEFENDANT, BEFORE FILING THE DEMURRER, TO "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" WITH THE PARTY WHO FILED THE COMPLAINT AND TO FILE A DECLARATION STATING THE MEANS BY WHICH THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED. DEFENDANTS SHALL IMMEDIATELY MEET AND CONFER WITH PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DUE NO LATER THAN MARCH 1, 2021. IF BOTH DEMURRERS ARE REFILED, PARTIES ARE TO SET THEM FOR THE SAME DATE. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-28-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KATHRYN COYSH'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 430.41. CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 430.41 REQUIRES A PARTY, BEFORE FILING THE DEMURRER, TO "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" WITH THE PARTY WHO FILED THE COMPLAINT AND TO FILE A DECLARATION STATING THE MEANS BY WHICH THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED. PLAINTIFF SHALL IMMEDIATELY MEET AND CONFER WITH THE DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DUE NO LATER THAN MARCH 1, 2021. IF BOTH DEMURRERS ARE REFILED, PARTIES ARE TO SET THEM FOR THE SAME DATE. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: Defendants Andrew Cohen, D.C. dba Proactive Chiropractic, Proactive Chiropractic Cohen Corp. and Andrew Cohen, D.C.'s Motion For Relief From Waiver Of Objections.

The Court notes that defendants did not properly contest the Court's tentative ruling and that opposing counsel is not present at today's hearing. As such, the Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. Defendants' motion for relief from waiver of late-served objections is denied.

Order signed.

Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Continued To Mar-23-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS ANDREW COHEN, PROACTIVE CHIROPRACTIC COHEN CORP. A CORPORATION, AND ANDREW COHEN's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar for failure to comply with Code of Civil Procedure section 430.41. Code of Civil Procedure section 430.41 requires a defendant, before filing the demurrer, to "meet and confer in person or by telephone" with the party who filed the complaint and to file a declaration stating the means by which the parties met and conferred. Defendants shall immediately meet and confer with plaintiff. Defendant's response to the first amended complaint is due no later than March 1, 2021. If both demurrers are refiled, parties are to set them for the same date.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KATHRYN COYSH's Demurrer to Cross-Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar for failure to comply with Code of Civil Procedure section 430.41. Code of Civil Procedure section 430.41 requires a party, before filing the demurrer, to "meet and confer in person or by telephone" with the party who filed the complaint and to file a declaration stating the means by which the parties met and conferred. Plaintiff shall immediately meet and confer with the defendants. Defendant's response to the first amended complaint is due no later than March 1, 2021. If both demurrers are refiled, parties are to set them for the same date.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
